body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: auto-embed and code index pipeline
body.intention: I intend to verify that the auto-embed pipeline does not degrade memory write performance and that the code index sweep does not produce stale or incorrect entries.
body.description:
**What changed:** Postgres trigger on clan.memories auto-queues embeddings; code_index table populated by Nanny Ogg cron; CC.0 session content deposited as memory on close.
**Predicted unintended effects:** Postgres trigger adds latency to every memory INSERT (measure: should be < 5ms); embedding_queue may accumulate unbounded if rackmount is slow or down; code_index sweep may index test files or vendor code that pollutes search results; session memory deposit may duplicate palace.sessions.* nodes.
**Signals to watch:** Monitor embedding_queue depth after 1 week — should drain to near-zero daily; check EXPLAIN ANALYZE on clan.memories INSERT; grep code_index for test_ and vendor paths; check for duplicate palace.sessions entries after multiple autocompacts.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-23.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
